summary: Comprehensive testing of PriceHunter chat-first shopping assistant. All backend API tests (14/14) passed. All frontend UI tests passed including chat flow, search results, filters, sorting, reset, and progress timeline.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice calls are MOCKED (MOCK_VOICE_CALLS=true) - offline vendor pricing is simulated, not real Bland.ai calls
Online pipeline results are simulated - not real e-commerce API integrations
Chat sessions stored in-memory (chat_sessions dict) - will be lost on server restart. Consider MongoDB persistence for production
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses LLM for conversation and simulated/mocked data for results
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: chat greeting, quick replies, message sending, search triggering, results display with rank/price/vendor/source_type/delivery/availability/confidence, filter (all/online/offline), sort (rank/price/delivery), show more results, reset chat, progress timeline with 6 stages. MOCKED: Voice calls (Bland.ai) and online e-commerce results are simulated.

features_tested.chat_page_loads_with_greeting: PASS - Greeting message displayed on load
features_tested.quick_reply_chips: PASS - 4 chips displayed, clicking populates input
features_tested.send_message_shows_bubbles: PASS - User and assistant bubbles appear correctly
features_tested.complete_query_triggers_search: PASS - 'cheapest iPhone 15 in Bangalore' triggers search and returns results
features_tested.results_section_shows_cards: PASS - Result cards display rank, source_type, vendor_name, price, delivery_time, availability, confidence
features_tested.progress_timeline_6_stages: PASS - All 6 stages shown with completion status
features_tested.new_search_resets_chat: PASS - Clears results and shows fresh greeting
features_tested.post_chat_message_api: PASS - Returns session_id, assistant_message, conversation_state, search_triggered, results, progress_states
features_tested.conversational_flow: PASS - Partial query (product only) prompts for location

mocked_apis_note: IMPORTANT: Voice calls (Bland.ai) are MOCKED via MOCK_VOICE_CALLS=true. Online e-commerce results are SIMULATED. LLM calls are REAL via Emergent key.
